compressed_prompt:
Titan makes clothing for large men. Write an advertisement for the company that would appeal to a wide audience. Make sentences short. Your response should not contain any comma.
ad, appeal
response:
**TITAN: BIG FITS RIGHT**

Titan makes clothes for big men. No more squeezing. No more stretching. Just perfect fit every time.

Strong fabrics. Bold styles. Built to last. Look sharp. Feel confident.

From workwear to weekends. Suits to sweats. We’ve got you covered.

Big guys deserve great clothes. Titan delivers.

Shop now. Wear proud. Live large. **Titan.**
